subject: Math
title: Geometry Basics
description: Lines, angles, shapes, perimeter and area.

questions.q: How many lines of symmetry does a square have?
questions.explanation: A square has 4 lines of symmetry: 2 through midpoints, 2 diagonal.

questions.q: An angle measuring exactly 90° is called a...
A triangle with ALL sides equal is called an ___ triangle.
questions.explanation: Equilateral means all three sides are equal.

questions.q: Perimeter of a rectangle 8 cm × 5 cm?
Area of a rectangle 9 cm × 4 cm in sq cm.

questions.explanation: Parallel lines stay the same distance apart and never meet.

questions.q: A square has sides of 7 cm. Area in sq cm?
An angle greater than 90° but less than 180° is called...
How many sides does a hexagon have?
